# CWE-915: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes
lang: go
file: CWE-915-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Profile struct {
	ID      uint
	Name    string
	Role    string
	Balance int
}

// Vulnerable: user-controlled map can update privileged fields such as role and balance.
func UpdateProfile(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	id := c.Param("id")
	var fields map[string]interface{}
	if err := c.BindJSON(&fields); err != nil {
		c.Status(http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	db.Model(&Profile{}).Where("id = ?", id).Updates(fields)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
